content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Negotiable Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement – Transportation Challenge 2017
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_9_nda_4

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2 – “Nondisclosure” – purpose of use of Confidential Information
type Purpose = 
    | AgreementPurpose(unit)   # use permitted only for the purposes set out in the Agreement
    | OtherPurpose(unit)      # any use outside the Agreement

@ Clause 1 – “Data Sharing” – the confidential data that is being exchanged
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    purpose: Purpose               # the purpose for which the data may be used
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The party that receives the data (BPS) – modeled for alignment with other standards
entity bps: Party = {
    name: string,
    address: string,
    role: string   # e.g. “Receiving Party”
}

@ The vendor that supplies the solution and is the “Disclosing Party”
entity vendor: Party = {
    name: string,
    address: string,
    role: string   # e.g. “Disclosing Party”
}

@ The confidential information that is the subject of the NDA
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – deontic constraints derived from the Agreement
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2 – “Nondisclosure” – the Vendor may NOT use the data for any purpose
# other than the purpose(s) expressly stated in the Agreement.
rule F vendor_must_not_use_confidential_info_for_other_purposes:
    confidential_info.purpose = Purpose.OtherPurpose() always

@ Clause 2 – “Nondisclosure” – the Vendor SHALL use the data ONLY for the
# purpose(s) expressly stated in the Agreement.
rule O vendor_must_use_confidential_info_only_for_agreement:
    confidential_info.purpose = Purpose.AgreementPurpose() always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Optional – auxiliary functions (none needed for this concise model)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
```
